'''Tumleh Navigation''' was a corporation that specialized in the production of navigation systems for [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] engines as well as research into hyperspatial programming and navigation. The business was the sister company of [[Shankti Drive Works]] and as such was based in the same city of [[D'larah]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Demophon]]. During the height of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Tumleh Navigation was involved in the [[NGW Hyperdrive Jump Program]], a program to discover a method to allow [[Starship/Legends|starships]] to navigate through hyperspace around [[Gravity well/Legends|gravity wells]]. Unfortunately for the company, the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Demophon (star)|Demophon]] went [[Supernova/Legends|supernova]] during this period, causing widespread devastation to the [[Demophon system/Legends|Demophon system]]. The destruction wiped out most, if not all of Tumleh Navigations research, although Tumleh maintained records of the data already gathered.
